I was young, but I had a big dream.
Hello, Maria Clara. I am Mark, a journalist. I traveled from London for this education forum. Can you tell me a little about your background?
Of course, Mark. I started my career when I was nineteen years old, in public service.
Nineteen years old! That is very young. I started my career at thirty, so you began much earlier. What did you do after that?
I studied a lot. I went to USP and UFSC, and I finished two degrees.
Two degrees. That is a great achievement. Was the doctorate difficult?
It was a big challenge at first. But I used to study every night, so the final exam was a piece of cake.
Wonderful. And today, you lead a large team, is that right?
Yes. I led a team of eight people, and now I represent my institution around the world.
What a story. I want to write an article about you for my magazine in London. What was the best moment in your career?
The day my granddaughter said my name in English. That was my favorite achievement.
I used to work in public administration.
The presentation was a piece of cake.
I started my career when I was nineteen years old.
I studied at two universities and I finished two degrees.
I led a team of eight people for many years.
It was a big challenge, but I never gave up.

Good evening, everyone. Tonight, I am happy to introduce a special guest from Brazil. Maria Clara started her career very young, at nineteen years old. She worked in public service for many years. She studied a lot, and she finished two doctorate degrees. She led a team of eight people, and she became a leader in education. Last year, she traveled to China and to Seoul. Her story is a story of hard work. Please welcome Maria Clara.

Hello, Maria Clara. This is Grace from the office. I called about the meeting yesterday. Thank you for your presentation. You spoke very well, and the guests liked your story. The director asked for your slides, so I sent them this morning. We also planned the next round table for Friday. It was a great day. Have a good evening, and see you soon.
Hello. My name is Maria Clara. I started my career at nineteen years old. I studied at two universities, and I led a team for many years. Today, I represent my institution around the world.
